text:
AS Jamaicans eagerly await the start of the Paris Olympic Games on July 26, Supreme Ventures Limited (SVL) is offering its customers a chance to be there to catch the action live.

SVL has announced the launch of its latest promotion, the ‘Golden Ticket’.

This will give customers the opportunity to win an all-expense-paid trip for two to the Games.

Additionally, participants can look forward to weekly prizes, ensuring numerous chances to win big throughout the promotion period, which kicked off on May 30 and runs until July 5, 2024.

According to head of marketing at SVL Kamal Powell, the promotion is another way for the company to provide a ticket to its customers’ dreams.

“We know that the Olympics are a big deal for Jamaicans, it is a time when we all come together to show our support for the love of sports and especially track and field. SVL wants to be at the very heart of that experience, what better way to cheer on the black, green and gold than to be live in Paris because of your Supreme Ventures Golden ticket,” said Powell.

He argued that the Golden Ticket promotion is simple and convenient. Customers are required to spend $500 or more on any Supreme Ventures product, either in-store or online atwww.supremegames.com.

After making a qualifying purchase, customers should write their name, phone number, and address on the back of their ticket and drop it into the designated boxes available at any SVL-operated retail store, regardless of where the ticket was originally purchased.

Alternatively, customers can enter online by visitingpromotions.supremegames.comand filling out the digital form.

For those who prefer to place their bets online on SV Games, entries will be automatically generated for every $500 spent.

“There is no limit to the number of entries a customer can make, so the more times they enter, the greater their chances of winning the coveted Supreme Ventures Golden Ticket,” added Powell.

He said Supreme Ventures will be announcing weekly winners via the company’s website and social media pages. Customers can also visit any SVL-operated retail store or COCO store for updates and information.

The grand prize draw, which will determine the lucky recipient of the trip for two to the 2024 Paris Olympics, will be held on July 8, 2024.

“It is important to note that the winner must possess a valid passport to claim their prize,” said Powell.

HOUSE RULES
title: SVL offering lucky customer a trip for two to 2024 Paris Olympics - Jamaica Observer
description: SVL offering lucky customer a trip for two to 2024 Paris Olympics
